title: ch: BOOM!
body:
# **!NOTICE!**
#### **DONT use this mod, its discontinued, and doesnt work**
### what is ch: BOOM!
ch: BOOM! is an space war and explosion featured addon for cosmic horizons

### why would i download CH: BOOM!
- > you want to fight in space against other ships (coming soon™)
- > you want to destroy planets from space
- > you want cool thrusters:
  - > laser thruster (soon™)
  - > light speed thruster (not so soon™)

### current features
-  WOMs (weapons of mass destruction)
    - > steel oblideration cannon

### soon™
- > laser weapons (block)
  - > small steel laser cannon
- > laser weapons (hand)
  - > steel RPG cannon
- > other cannons (block)
  - > steel railgun
